mapper.update: UPDATE know_posts SET status = 'published', publish_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM know_posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM know_posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND p.status = 'published' ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE know_posts SET is_top = #{isTop}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
UPDATE know_posts SET visible = #{visible}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
UPDATE know_posts SET status = 'deleted', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.creator_id AS creatorId, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, p.content_url AS contentUrl, p.content_etag AS contentEtag, p.content_sha256 AS contentSha256, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop, p.visible, p.type, p.status FROM know_posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM know_posts WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = 'published'
SELECT id FROM know_posts WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = 'published'
